---
title: "Jarvis Gao"
title-block: false
---

::: {#home .hero-section}
::: {.hero-overlay}
# Jarvis Gao { .hero-title }
[Columbia University · Quantitative Research · Personal Blog]{.hero-subtitle}

[⌄](#about){.scroll-down}
:::
:::

::: {#about .section .about-section}
::: {.section-container}
::: {.about-grid}

::: {.about-text}
## About Me

I am currently a graduate student at [Columbia University]{.highlight}.

Previously, I studied Finance at [Shanghai University of Finance and Economics]{.highlight}.

My professional interests lie in understanding and modeling complex financial markets, where extracting meaningful signals from noisy data is a central challenge. I focus in particular on volatility, derivatives, and systematic trading strategies.

Outside my academic and professional work, I enjoy Formula 1, basketball, and traveling.
:::

::: {.about-image-wrap}
![](images/profile.jpg){.about-image alt="Profile photo"}
:::

:::
:::
:::


::: {#cv .section .cv-section}
::: {.section-container}
::: {.content-box}
## Experience

**Education and Awards**

- M.S. Financial Engineering, [Columbia University]{.highlight}, 2026
- B.A. Finance, [Shanghai University of Finance and Economics]{.highlight}, 2025

**Professional Experiences**

- [Barclays]{.highlight}, Market QA Intern, upcoming
- [Columbia University]{.highlight}, Teaching Assistant, 2026
- [Hongqiangtaihe Fund Management]{.highlight}, Quantitative Research Intern, 2025
- [Zhurun Investment]{.highlight}, Quantitative Research Intern, 2024–2025
- [Guotai Junan Securities]{.highlight}, Quantitative Research Intern, 2024
:::
:::
:::


::: {#blog .section .blog-section}
::: {.section-container}
::: {.content-box}
## Blog

A space for selected blogs.

[Visit My Blog](https://jarvisgao777.github.io/myblog/){target="_blank"}
:::
:::
:::

::: {#contact .section .contact-section}
::: {.section-container}
::: {.contact-box}
## Contact Me

[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/jarvis-gao-22ba15348/){.linkedin-button target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.site-footer}
© Jarvis Gao 2026
:::
:::
:::
